ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the climate data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the climate data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the climate data was collected */,
  "mean_temperature" REAL /* Mean temperature for the period */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature for the period */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature for the period */,
  "total_rainfall" REAL /* Total rainfall for the period */,
  "mean_humidity" REAL /* Mean humidity for the period */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed for the period */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "sunshine_duration" REAL /* Duration of sunshine */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the climate data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES climate_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "epidemiological_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each epidemiological data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the epidemiological data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the epidemiological data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the epidemiological data was collected */,
  "dengue_cases" INTEGER /* Number of dengue cases for the period */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the affected population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the affected population */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Common symptoms reported */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Rate of hospitalization among the affected population */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the epidemiological data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epidemiological_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_trends" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search trend entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the search trend data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the search trend data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the search trend data was collected */,
  "searches" INTEGER /* Number of searches for the period */,
  "search_term" TEXT /* Specific search term used */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the search (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the search trend data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_trends_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_trends_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of climate data source (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the source was last updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the data provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_sources_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each epidemiological data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the epidemiological data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of epidemiological data source (e.g., public health records, online reports) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the source was last updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the data provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_sources_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data being accessed */,
  "epidemiological_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_epidemiological_id FOREIGN KEY ("epidemiological_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("epidemiological_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_climate_id FOREIGN KEY ("climate_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("climate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_epidemiological_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data in the relationship */,
  "epidemiological_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data in the relationship */,
  "correlation_coefficient" REAL /* Correlation coefficient between the climate and epidemiological data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the correlation coefficient */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the correlation coefficient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_epidemiological_relationships_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_epidemiological_relationships_climate_id FOREIGN KEY ("climate_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("climate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_epidemiological_relationships_epidemiological_id FOREIGN KEY ("epidemiological_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("epidemiological_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data used for the prediction */,
  "epidemiological_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data used for the prediction */,
  "predicted_dengue_cases" INTEGER /* Predicted number of dengue cases */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_period" TEXT /* Period for which the prediction is made (e.g., next month, next year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_epidemiological_id FOREIGN KEY ("epidemiological_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("epidemiological_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_climate_id FOREIGN KEY ("climate_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("climate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographic location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographic location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the geographic location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the geographic location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or administrative area of the geographic location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the predictive model (e.g., linear regression, neural network) */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Date the model was last trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
